_max_entries_per_day_note: Set to -1 to disable the hard cap and rely on buying power and AI judgment alone.
_separate_spread_entry_note: Controls IC order structure. false = always 4-leg combo. true = always separate 2-leg spreads. "auto" = agent evaluates per-iteration: favors separate when IV rank > 0.35, session is late/open_volatile, or 2+ ICs already open; falls back to separate if combo dry_run returns warnings.

email._note: SendGrid API key is stored via the OS keyring (Windows Credential Manager, macOS Keychain, Linux Secret Service) or the MEICAGENT_SENDGRID_KEY environment variable. Run: python -c "import keyring; keyring.set_password('meicagent', 'sendgrid_api_key', 'YOUR_KEY')" to store via keyring.
